title: Icacorea longicaudata
intro: Icacorea longicaudata, also known as Icacina, is a medicinal plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Icacinaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, infections, and oxidative stress. Bioactive constituents of Icacorea longicaudata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Icacorea longicaudata is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to treat various ailments, making it a common herbal preparation in African folk medicine.
